executable_template.applicability_check: Apply when QA/review reports are prose-only, old test failures pollute QA, Para currentTask is stale, or KB fix records cannot be executed safely.
executable_template.patch_strategy: Require structured JSON contracts, compare QA against clean baseline, block auto-merge on structured risk, and enrich KB records with executable templates.
executable_template.rollback_plan: Revert the self_maintenance_loop_runner and self_evolution_knowledge changes; remove the generated baseline if structured gate blocks all runs unexpectedly.

fix_diff: Added structured review/QA JSON markers and _structured_report_gate(); policy now blocks missing/failed structured QA/review JSON before auto-merge. Added clean baseline read/write with initial allowed pytest/ruff/openapi counts and prompt injection. Added Para codex currentTask busy wait and stale idle currentTask cleanup. Extended fix knowledge with executable_template: applicability_check, patch_strategy, required_tests, rollback_plan.
root_cause: 策略解析散文而非结构化契约；QA 没有干净基线来区分历史失败与新失败；合并门禁字段是隐式的；Para 设备可用性忽略了 codex currentTask；修复知识缺少适用性和回滚说明。
symptom: 自维护循环依赖自然语言 QA/审查报告、脏的全量测试历史、松散的合并门禁、Para currentTask 污染和不可执行的 KB 记录。
